name: Popcorn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder, salt, and sugar together.
2. Add milk, popped corn, egg, and melted shortening to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
3. Fill prepared muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
4. Bake in a preheated hot oven (435°F) for 25 minutes.
5. Serve 6 servings.
Grace Viall Gray, Glen Ellyn, IL.
